name: NM100060
description: NM100060 is NexMed's proprietary nail lacquer treatment for onychomycosis (nail fungal infection).
mechanismOfAction: M100060 is a delivery medium for terbinafine. Terbinafine is hypothesized to act by inhibiting squalene epoxidase, thus blocking the biosynthesis of ergosterol, an essential component of fungal cell membranes.
pharmacodynamics: M100060 is a topical application of Lamisil (terbinafine).
